prompt.content: During the due diligence period, Liverbird discovers sewage waste under the surface of a portion of the site to be developed. They have determined it will cost an extra $100,000 to remove this sewage. Create a list of steps that Liverbird must follow in order to request a reduction in the purchase price from the city under the latest version of the disposition & development agreement. Provide citations for each step.

rubrics.name: States 1. Compile written reports from qualified consultants documenting the... (ver_51dd689d0f2e4c86ab3e37d4eb88bc6b)

messages.content: States 1. Compile written reports from qualified consultants documenting the contamination. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 5.3(b).

rubrics.name: States 2. Draft a written request to the City for a $100,000 reduction of the... (ver_e5a3844693c1479b9c8cccc6cc60f5d8)

messages.content: States 2. Draft a written request to the City for a $100,000 reduction of the purchase price with the supporting documentation from Step 1. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 5.3(b).

rubrics.name: States 3. Deliver the written notice by personal service, certified mail, or... (ver_9f8514d6be304b1891354bdd4551ff73)

messages.content: States 3. Deliver the written notice by personal service, certified mail, or reputable overnight courier. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 18.2.

rubrics.name: States the specific recipient of the written notice is City of San Dimas,... (ver_0f224f7eea9e4674953d9e1538b10c24)

messages.content: States the specific recipient of the written notice is City of San Dimas, Attn: Myric, City Attorney. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 18.2.

rubrics.name: States the written notice must be addressed to 245 East Bonita Avenue, San... (ver_4fee208e6ad048eab4ede57d3c1e0cd1)

messages.content: States the written notice must be addressed to 245 East Bonita Avenue, San Dimas, CA 91773. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 18.2.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
1. Compile written reports from qualified consultants documenting the contamination. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 5.3(b).
2. Draft a written request to the City for a $100,000 reduction of the purchase price with the supporting documentation from Step 1. V.2 - DDA Draft Section 5.3(b).
3. Deliver the written notice by personal service, certified mail, or reputable overnight courier addressed to (V.2 - DDA Draft Section 18.2):
City of San Dimas
Attn: Myric, City Attorney
245 East Bonita Avenue
San Dimas, CA 91773
